title: Mehak Merchant
content:
People.ContactEmail mmerchant@mccarthy.ca
- Osgoode Hall Law School
Mehak Batool Merchant is an articling student in our Toronto office. She recently earned her J.D. from Osgoode Hall Law School, where she completed the Clinical Intensive Program in Poverty Law at Parkdale Community Legal Services and served as VP Communications for both the Osgoode Women's Network and the Muslim Law Students Association.
Prior to law school, Mehak completed her Bachelor of Business Administration with Distinction at Simon Fraser University, with concentrations in Law and Philosophy and in Marketing, as well as a Certificate in Ethics: Theory and Applications.
She has held roles with the Chartered Professional Accountants of British Columbia and the Canada Revenue Agency, and has been involved in numerous community initiatives focused on legal and business youth education, civil liberties, and public outreach.
Mehak summered at McCarthy Tétrault and is fluent in multiple South Asian languages. She enjoys spoken word poetry, reading and boxing.
